## About the University of Lagos

Basic information and contact details for the University of Lagos

institution

The University of Lagos, sometimes referred to as UNILAG, is a public research institution located in Lagos, Nigeria. It was established in 1962.

The university is made up of three campuses - two campuses are located at Yaba and the college of medicine is located at Idi-Araba, Surulere.

There are 12 faculties at the university including arts, clinical sciences, education, engineering, law, pharmacy, social sciences and sciences among others. There are also 12 institutes and colleges including the College of Medicine, the Institute of Maritime Studies, the UNILAG Business School and the International School.

There are a range of research institutions covering a diverse area of research topics including the Centre for Housing Studies.

\\
Covenant University\\
\\
Ota, Nigeria\\
\\
Covenant University is a private Pentecostal Christian University, which has been operating with official status since 2002 in Ota, Nigeria. The university’s mission is to be a world-class Christian university and to raise a new generation of leaders. There are over 7,000 students studying at Covent University and 1,000 staff members.\\
\\
The university has four colleges, mostly dedicated towards vocational studies: The College of Business and Social Sciences; College of Leadership and Development Studies; College of Engineering, and the College of Science and Technology. Covenant University has had a rapid rise in reputation in the decade and a half it has been operating. The Nigerian Universities Commission named it the best private university in Nigeria in its 2018 rankings and the 6th best university overall. \\
\\
The university is owned by Living Faith Church Worldwide, which is also based in Ota. David Oyedepo, who founded the church in 1983, is the chancellor at Covenant. Living Faith Church Worldwide’s megachurch, the Faith Tabernacle in Ota, is one of the largest church auditoriums in the world with capacity for 50,000 worshippers. The town is in the south-west of Nigeria, about 30 kilometres north of Lagos.\\
\\
Facilities at Covenant University include its large three storey library, known as the Centre for Learning Resources. The 10 halls of residence on campus can accommodate over 9,000 students. Covenant University has restrictions on dress code and it has controversially suspended students in the past for not attending church services. \\
\\

###### Professor / Associate Professor / Assistant Professor / Lecturer, School of Business

![Macau University of Science and Technology](https://www.timeshighereducation.com/unijobs/getasset/431400a3-4f0d-46f4-9c87-5dc7af370611/)

### Macau University of Science and Technology

### Macao

![institution](https://www.timeshighereducation.com/academic-ui-assets/dsc/svg/flat/institution.svg?4)

### Macau University of Science and Technology

### Macao

* * *

Department: School of Business

Position: Professor / Associate Professor / Assistant Professor / Lecturer

Description

The School of Business (MSB) was established in 2000 and is the largest faculty in the University. Consistent with MSB’s mission to “(1) promote innovation and dissemination of knowledge in business and management, (2) nurture responsible business talents with international perspectives, and (3) contribute to the social and economic development of the local communities and the region”, the School has offered high quality undergraduate and postgraduate programs in most business disciplines. Many of these programs are accredited by professional organizations such as the ACCA, CPA Australia, CIMA and CILT (for BBA in Supply Chain Management). In July 2023, MSB earned AACSB (The Association to Advance Collegiate Schools of Business) International Accreditation and is positioned among the top 6% of business schools globally. According to the Times Higher Education (THE) World University Rankings by Subject 2023, the subject of “Business and Economics” of Macao University of Science and Technology is ranked in the range of 176-200.

With diverse faculty members having degrees from top-tier universities around the world, the School keeps training students’ leadership and creativity, discovering students’ talent and potential, and integrating “business ethics, communication skills and globalization” into the curriculum, which will lead the School to be an innovative business school that is most dynamic and broadly influential in the region.

To cope with our developmental plan, applications are invited from those with excellent academic achievements in the following areas:

Professional Areas

Fintech, Quantitative Finance, Accounting, Economics, Marketing, Human Resource Management, Public Administration, Philanthropy and Social Organization Management, International Trade, Supply Chain Management, Business Analytics and other relevant areas.

Qualifications

An earned Doctorate Degree in related discipline;
Bilingual teaching ability preferred;
Proven university teaching experience in related disciplines and strong experience in research records (with overseas experiences would be an advantage).

Remuneration Package

Remuneration and appointment rank offered will be commensurate with the successful applicants’ academic qualification, professional experience and current position. Medical benefits, annual leave, provident fund, allowance and bonus, on job training program or overseas study opportunities will be provided by the University.

Application Procedure

Qualified candidates should apply the position online at the University’s careers site (https://www.must.edu.mo/en/careers) and upload an up-to-date curriculum vitae with expected salary, copies of ID/passport, certified copies of academic certificates, transcripts, testimonial of professional experience, publications and academic research outline etc.

To browse for more information about MUST, please visit https://www.must.edu.mo/en

Salary

Competitive

Posted

17 Jul 2026

###### Professor/Associate Professor/Assistant Professor, Faculty of Medicine

![Macau University of Science and Technology](https://www.timeshighereducation.com/unijobs/getasset/431400a3-4f0d-46f4-9c87-5dc7af370611/)

### Macau University of Science and Technology

### Macao

![institution](https://www.timeshighereducation.com/academic-ui-assets/dsc/svg/flat/institution.svg?4)

### Macau University of Science and Technology

### Macao

* * *

Department: Faculty of Medicine

Position: Professor/Associate Professor/Assistant Professor

Description

As a pioneer of medical education of Macau, the Faculty of Medicine will continue to adhere to its university motto in developing and optimizing its medical education, namely: “Dedication to practical studies, enhancement of knowledge, ability and quality humanity and excellence”. We are dedicated to our mission of cultivating medical professionals with excellent quality and promoting the development of healthcare in Macau. At present, the Faculty offers six programs in five areas of study including: Public Health, Nursing, Medicine, Food and Nutritional Science and Pharmacy.

To cope with our developmental plan, applications are invited from those with excellent academic achievements in the following areas:

Professional Areas

Anatomy and Histology, Physiology, Biochemistry, Pharmacology, Pathology and Microbiology;
Food Science(preferably for teaching concurrently food chemistry, food processing, food research and development, and food safety);
Nutritional Science(preferably for teaching concurrently clinical nutrition, public nutrition and health promotion);
Chemistry(preferably for teaching concurrently organic chemistry, chemical analysis, food chemistry and analysis).

Qualifications

An earned Doctorate Degree in related discipline with medical degree (MBBS/MD preferred).
Proven university teaching experience in related disciplines and strong experience in teaching and research (with overseas experience would be an advantage).

Remuneration Package

Remuneration and appointment rank offered will be commensurate with the successful applicants’ academic qualification, professional experience and current position. Medical benefits, annual leave, provident fund, allowance and bonus, on job training program or overseas study opportunities will be provided by the University.

Application Procedure

Qualified candidates should apply the position online at the University’s careers site (https://www.must.edu.mo/en/careers) and upload an up-to-date curriculum vitae with expected salary, copies of ID/passport, certified copies of academic certificates, transcripts, testimonial of professional experience, publications and academic research outline etc.

To browse for more information about MUST, please visit https://www.must.edu.mo/en

Salary

Competitive

Posted

###### University Assistant Postdoctoral, Psychology

![UNIVERSITY OF VIENNA](https://www.timeshighereducation.com/unijobs/getasset/e3a59d10-b9c4-48e4-90e7-5c2ca38d5e76/)

### University of Vienna

### Austria, Vienna Danubepier Hov

![institution](https://www.timeshighereducation.com/academic-ui-assets/dsc/svg/flat/institution.svg?4)

### University of Vienna

### Austria, Vienna Danubepier Hov

* * *

The University of Vienna is a community of almost 11,000 individuals, including approximately 7,700 academic staff members, who passionately pursue answers to the profound questions that shape our future. Fueled by curiosity and a deep sense of duty, they contribute invaluable insights to research and teaching, enriching our society. Are you inspired and driven by the desire to make a meaningful impact? We are currently seeking a/an

University Assistant postdoctoral

47 Faculty of Psychology
Startdate: 01.11.2026 \| Working hours: 30 \| Collective bargaining agreement: §48 VwGr. B1 lit. b (postdoc)
Reference no.: 5923

At the University of Vienna, more than 10,000 people work together towards answering the big questions of the future. Around 7,700 of them are scientists who, with their curiosity and continuous demand for excellence, conduct top-level international research and teaching. Are you also looking for the right space to develop your potential? We are seeking a/an

Your place of work:

The Faculty of Psychology at the University of Vienna comprises the Dean's Office, a Student Service Center, four institutes, and the Outpatient Unit for Research, Teaching and Practice.

Your future position is based with the new Professorship of clinical-psychological intervention research (Prof. Dr. Johanna Böttcher), which will be established in October 2026 at the Institute for Clinical and Health Psychology.

The research group investigates innovative digital interventions for mental disorders and psychological distress. The research focuses on acceptance, effectiveness, and mechanisms of action in various digital settings.
Other key research areas of the professorship include:

Transdiagnostic processes and approach
Transcultural Psychotherapy
Side Effects of Psychological Treatment

The working group actively promotes open and reproducible science (e.g., through pre-registration and the sharing of materials and data) and values diverse perspectives.

Your future tasks:

Active participation in research, teaching & administration, which means:

You strengthen a research profile in the field of clinical-psychological intervention research.
You support the coordination and research activities of our digital intervention platform (currently under development) and the university outpatient clinic.
You plan and conduct your own scientific studies.
You publish articles in international peer-reviewed journals.
You give presentations at national and international scientific conferences.
You participate in science communication activities.
You apply for projects and raise third-party funds.
You hold courses independently within the scope of the provisions of the collective bargaining agreement.
You supervise students.
You participate in evaluation measures and in quality assurance.
You take on administrative tasks in research and teaching.

This is part of your personality:

Completed doctoral/PhD studies in psychology.
Experience in the field of scientific intervention research.
In-depth knowledge of quantitative data analysis methods, including data analysis using Python, R, or similar software.
Proven research competence and initiative through international publications in peer-reviewed journals.
Excellent spoken and written English skills.
Ability to work in an interdisciplinary team.
Leadership skills and ability to work in a team.
Diligent, independent work methods.
Strong sense of responsibility.

Desirable qualifications are:

Experience with and interest in innovative study-designs for investigating the efficacy and mechanisms of action of clinical interventions.
Experience with qualitative designs, ecological momentary assessments, or meta-analyses.
Experience with and interest in transcultural psychotherapy and the treatment of marginalized groups.
Very good spoken and written German language skills.
Additional language skills (e.g., Arabic, Farsi, Turkish, Russian…).
Teaching experience / experience with e-learning.

What we offer:

Work-life balance: Our employees enjoy flexible working hours, remote/hybrid upon agreement.

Inspiring working atmosphere: You are part of a friendly and supportive team with excellent research infrastructure and connections to other interdisciplinary research initiatives. We will help you refine your research profile and actively support your professional development.

Internal further training & Coaching: Opportunity to deepen your skills on an ongoing basis. There are over 600 courses to choose from – free of charge.

Fixed-term contract and fair salary: The basic salary of EUR 5.014,30 (14 times a year) increases if we can credit professional experience. We offer an initial contract for three years. This contract can be extended to six years in total by mutual agreement.

Good public transport connections: Your workplace is easily accessible by public transport.

Equal opportunities for all: We welcome every additional/new personality to the team!

It is that easy to apply:

We look forward to receiving your detailed application with a letter of motivation (max. two pages).
Please include your academic CV in tabular form (including your list of publications and a list of courses and lectures you have given).
A brief description of a potential research project to be carried out during the first year of the postdoc position (max. 1 page).
Contact details of of at least two people who could provide reference letters.
Degree certificates, official notifications.
Via our job portal / Apply now - button.

If you have any questions, please contact:

Johanna Böttcher

johanna.boettcher@univie.ac.at

We look forward to new personalities in our team!
The University of Vienna has an anti-discriminatory employment policy and attaches great importance to equal opportunities, the advancement of women and diversity. We place particular emphasis on enhancing women’s representation among the academic and general university staff, particularly in leadership roles, and therefore expressly encourage qualified women to apply. Given equal qualifications, preference will be given to female candidates.

University of Vienna. Space for personalities. Since 1365.

Data protection

​Application deadline: 08/06/2026

Post Doc

Salary

The basic salary of EUR 5.014,30 (14 times a year)

Department: Department of General Education

Position: Professor / Associate Professor / Assistant Professor / Lecturer

Description

The Department of General Education (DGE) provides various common courses to students, aiming to prepare them for further education and future development. DGE is to organize and operate various common courses.  These common courses provide students the very fundamental knowledge which helps them to improve their learning ability and composite quality.  Students will find these essential in order to accommodate to both educational and professional development in the later stage.

To cope with our developmental plan, applications are invited from those with excellent academic achievements in the following areas:

Professional Areas

Philosophy, Logics, Debating/Public Speaking, Languages, Physical Education, General Education and other relevant areas.

Qualifications

An earned Doctorate Degree in related discipline.
Bilingual teaching ability preferred.
Proven university teaching experience in related disciplines and strong experience in research records (with overseas experiences would be an advantage).

Remuneration Package

Remuneration and appointment rank offered will be commensurate with the successful applicants’ academic qualification, professional experience and current position. Medical benefits, annual leave, provident fund, allowance and bonus, on job training program or overseas study opportunities will be provided by the University.

Application Procedure

Qualified candidates should apply the position online at the University’s careers site (https://www.must.edu.mo/en/careers) and upload an up-to-date curriculum vitae with expected salary, copies of ID/passport, certified copies of academic certificates, transcripts, testimonial of professional experience, publications and academic research outline etc.

To browse for more information about MUST, please visit https://www.must.edu.mo/en

Competitive

###### Work-based and Placement Learning Senior Administrator

![LIVERPOOL JOHN MOORES UNIVERSITY](https://www.timeshighereducation.com/unijobs/getasset/0ca3f097-c9d3-49b6-825d-d4f65410f949/)

### Liverpool John Moores University (LJMU)

### United Kingdom, Liverpool

![institution](https://www.timeshighereducation.com/academic-ui-assets/dsc/svg/flat/institution.svg?4)

### Liverpool John Moores University (LJMU)

### United Kingdom, Liverpool

* * *

Liverpool John Moores University (LJMU) is a distinctive, unique institution, rooted in the Liverpool City Region and with a global presence. Our students and staff, past, present, and future, are the beating heart of our city and can be found in every corner of every industry and community. We couldn’t exist anywhere else and have shaped the city in which we belong. Working with the people of Liverpool to improve lives and support communities is at the heart of why we were founded and why we exist today.

We are seeking an experienced and highly organised Work-based and Placement Learning Senior Administrator to join our Faculty of Health, Innovation, Technology and Science (HITS). This is an exciting opportunity for a proactive professional to play a key role in the delivery, governance and continuous improvement of work-based and placement learning activities across a diverse portfolio of programmes.

As the Senior Administrative Lead within the Work-based and Placement Learning Team, you will provide specialist support for placement and work-based learning activities, ensuring compliance with university regulations, professional body requirements and external reporting obligations.

You will be responsible for overseeing complex administrative processes, supporting placement management systems, coordinating student placement activity and acting as a key point of contact for students, academic colleagues, employers, placement providers and external agencies.

Working closely with the Work-based and Placement Learning Manager, you will contribute to strategic and operational developments, support process improvement initiatives and help ensure an efficient, compliant and student-focused service.

In return, we offer an excellent benefits package including generous annual leave entitlement, pension scheme, induction and development support as well as family-friendly policies.

This is an exciting time to join the university as we deliver the LJMU Strategy 2030 and its vision of LJMU as an inclusive civic university transforming lives and futures, by placing students at the heart of everything we do.

If you feel that this is the role you have been looking for and your skills and experience can make a real difference at LJMU, we look forward to hearing from you.

Please note we do not accept supplementary information when considering applications for this post and ask that you complete the on-line application only. Within the application form there is the opportunity for you to include everything that you wish panel members to consider, particularly in the Personal Statement section.

LJMU values diversity and provides a supportive and inclusive environment where everyone can fulfil their potential.

Please note all of our vacancies will be closed to applications at midnight on the advertised closing date, unless otherwise stated.

Salary

£26,707 - £31,236 per annum

Posted

16 Jul 2026
